examples: He always had a yearning to be a schoolteacher.
I am worried for the firefighter. I am worried for the schoolteacher.
Or in the worst case scenario, you just go become a high schoolteacher.
Mayawati, a schoolteacher turned politician, is India's best-known leader of Dalit, or low-caste, groups.
Your typical victim of investment folly is not necessarily a hapless schoolteacher or a gullible dentist.
